shared_properties: Pointed head crest and chest sigil remain visible.
differences: Exposure wash adds a bright white edge on the beam facing side.
Torso contracts inward by 3 px to show damage tension.
Amber crack flickers appear around the eye and shoulder line.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_character
reference_images.purpose: Umbra silhouette, limb taper, eye glow placement, and cloak-like vapor edge anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle on the UmbraActor entity and switch to this atlas while the exposure state flag is active.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_umbra_exposure_5f_10fps.png through AssetServer and attach it to the exposure feedback state.
runtime_notes: Loop runs at 10 fps while exposure is above zero and can be interrupted by HP loss reset.
Bright edge art stays on the beam facing side and can mirror when the actor flips horizontally.
No sprite origin change is allowed relative to the idle atlas.

context.usage: Damage feedback state shown when the Umbra hitbox overlaps any active light beam and the exposure meter rises.

shape.silhouette: Contracted shadow body with a beam side white flare, fractured amber seams, and a backward lean that signals danger.

appendages.accessories: Gold chest sigil remains centered under the eye line.

specs.texture: Hard white exposure burn and thin amber fracture lines over the black silhouette.
specs.shading: White beam edge flare over a deep black core with small amber pulses near the shoulder and eye.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 160x48 px with five 32x48 frames.
Exposure flare stays on one side of the silhouette in every frame and never covers more than 10 px of body width.
Amber fracture lines remain readable at 1920x1080 camera scale without breaking the main body outline.
